summary: Candidate-handover EXP for creating and updating Ministry of Health data platform project update PowerPoint decks using a template-context rebuild workflow.

context.task_family: PowerPoint project update decks for MoH / NSW Health style stakeholders
output_focus: related business and meeting schedule slides

scope_limits: This EXP is context-specific to Barry's MoH data platform update deck style.
Do not treat it as a generic corporate PowerPoint skill.
Do not publish private project decks or derived materials to GitHub main.
